use_cases: Add magical sparkle effects to landing pages for visual delight
Enhance product showcases with cursor-following particle trails
Create interactive cursor effects for creative portfolio sites
Build engaging micro-interactions for premium brand experiences
ai_summary: A decorative React component that creates animated sparkle effects following the mouse cursor, spawning randomized stars with customizable colors, sizes, and animation durations. The effect includes a subtle glow trail and supports fine-tuned control over spawn frequency and visual parameters, making it ideal for adding whimsical, premium interactions to any web experience.
